title: Authoring Documents
description: Write company SOPs from templates, format in the editor, cite and crosswalk regulations, and move documents through review with an audit trail.

steps.caption: Open Author → Company documents
steps.narration: Open the Author menu in the top bar, and choose Company documents.

steps.caption: Your company documents
steps.narration: This is your document library — SOPs, policies, permits and standards, all authored in-app.

steps.caption: Organise into project folders
steps.narration: Organise them into project folders down the left, and add new ones as your work grows.

steps.caption: SOPs, policies, permits, standards
steps.narration: Every document type lives here, side by side.

steps.caption: Status & ownership at a glance
steps.narration: Each card shows its version, owner, and where it sits — draft, in review, or effective.

steps.caption: Click “+ New”
steps.narration: From your documents, click New to start a fresh one.

steps.caption: Pick a template family
steps.narration: Choose a template family — OSHA process safety, ISO 9001 quality, FDA design controls, and more.

steps.caption: Pre-structured for you
steps.narration: Each is a specific document — like an operating procedure — pre-structured with the right sections and content blocks.

steps.caption: Create from the template
steps.narration: Create from the template, and your draft is scaffolded in seconds.

steps.caption: Land on your document hub
steps.narration: You land on the document — workflow, linked regulations, assets and comments all one click away.

steps.caption: Click “Edit”
steps.narration: Open the document and click Edit to write in the built-in editor.

steps.caption: A familiar toolbar
steps.narration: Format like a word processor — headings, bold, lists and quotes.

steps.caption: Add and edit sections
steps.narration: Add new sections — like a shutdown procedure — right inside the document.

steps.caption: A live section outline
steps.narration: A live outline down the left tracks every section as you write.

steps.caption: Tables, rows and page breaks
steps.narration: Insert tables, rows and columns, and page breaks for a clean, audit-ready export.

steps.caption: Click “Clause linking”
steps.narration: On the document, click Clause linking — the section-to-clause traceability matrix that auditors look for.

steps.caption: Open the mapping workspace
steps.narration: Open the mapping workspace to build it, clause by clause.

steps.caption: Crosswalk against a regulation
steps.narration: Search for the regulation you're mapping against, and pull up its clauses.

steps.caption: Map sections to clauses
steps.narration: Pair each section of your document with the matching regulation clause.

steps.caption: Save the traceability matrix
steps.narration: Save it, and you've built a clause-by-clause traceability matrix.

steps.caption: Click “Linked regulations”
steps.narration: On the document hub, click Linked regulations to see what it's in scope of.

steps.caption: Pinned to the version on file
steps.narration: Link every regulation it covers — each pinned to the version on file, so it flags when that regulation changes.

steps.caption: Link the assets it governs
steps.narration: Link the assets it governs, tying the document into your live compliance picture.

steps.caption: Comment & resolve
steps.narration: Reviewers leave comments anchored to paragraphs or clauses, and resolve them as they go.

steps.caption: Move through review & sign off
steps.narration: Then move the document through review and sign off — every step captures an electronic signature and a full audit trail.
